eligibility.vehicle_types: Private and Commercial vehicles using Petrol, Diesel, Hybrid, EV, or CNG
eligibility.ev_rule: EV plans are only for EV vehicles
eligibility.age_limit: Vehicles older than 15 years are not eligible
eligibility.duration: Coverage duration is between 1 to 5 years

payments_and_renewals.activation: Policy becomes active after first premium payment
payments_and_renewals.cancellation: Policy is cancelled if payment is not made within 30 days
payments_and_renewals.renewal_window: Allowed 30 days before or after expiry
payments_and_renewals.renewal_condition: Cannot renew if there is an outstanding balance

transfers.conditions: Transfer not allowed if there is an active claim
